questions.question: Who is the director of the Indian film ‘Tanvi: The Great’, which had its world premiere at the Cannes Film Market during the 78ᵗʰ Cannes Film Festival in 2025?
Which Indian author won the 2025 International Booker Prize for the short story collection 'Heart Lamp'?
Who translated the book 'Heart Lamp' into English, making it the first Kannada work to win the 2025 International Booker Prize?
Who authored the book 'AI on Trial' that was released in April 2025?
questions.option_4: Manohar Lal Khattar and Himanshu Dhuliya

questions.question: Who has written the book ‘Parliament: Powers, Functions & Privileges; A Comparative Constitutional Perspective’, launched by the former Vice-President Jagdeep Dhankhar in January 2025?
Who among the following wrote the novel Godaan, which is considered a classic of modern Hindi literature?
Rabindranath Tagore's "Geetanjali," which was awarded the Nobel Prize in 1913, is best classified as which form of writing?
Which of the following Indian English writers created the fictional town of Malgudi?
Which author released 'The Himalaya in a Small House' in 2025, chronicling life in a Himalayan village?
Which of the following authors penned the novel "Midnight's Children," famous for its fusion of historical narratives with elements of magical realism?
Which book written in Kannada received the 2025 International Booker Prize?
questions.option_1: The Girl with the Seven Lives

questions.question: Which of the following Bengali writers composed the famous novel Anandamath?
